{"id":"bd-c0t","title":"Batch IN-clause queries in 4 functions in dependencies.go","description":"Four functions in internal/storage/dolt/dependencies.go build unbounded IN clauses that cause pathological Dolt query planning with 600+ issues:

1. GetBlockingInfoForIssues
2. getIssuesByIDsDolt  
3. getDependencyRecordsForIssuesDolt
4. GetDependencyCounts

queryBatchSize=200 is already defined in queries.go but these 4 functions do NOT use it. Each must be refactored to batch its IN clause into chunks of 200.

Reference fix exists on branch fix/batch-dependency-queries in /tmp/beads-fix/internal/storage/dolt/dependencies.go — use as reference, do not copy blindly.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"noreply@anthropic.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T06:32:59Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-03T06:32:59Z"}

{"description":"attached_molecule: bd-wisp-4eq8
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-03-03T07:12:07Z
dispatched_by: unknown

Four functions in internal/storage/dolt/dependencies.go build unbounded IN clauses that cause pathological Dolt query planning with 600+ issues:

1. GetBlockingInfoForIssues
2. getIssuesByIDsDolt  
3. getDependencyRecordsForIssuesDolt
4. GetDependencyCounts

queryBatchSize=200 is already defined in queries.go but these 4 functions do NOT use it. Each must be refactored to batch its IN clause into chunks of 200.

Reference fix exists on branch fix/batch-dependency-queries in /tmp/beads-fix/internal/storage/dolt/dependencies.go — use as reference, do not copy blindly."}
